word: H7997 - שָׁלַל - shâlal - shaw-lal' - Let fall

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁלל

Transliteration: shâlal

Phonetic: shaw-lal'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Qal) to draw out
  2. to spoil, plunder, take spoil
    1. (Qal) to spoil, plunder
    2. (Hithpolel) to be spoiled, be plundered

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2399,2400

Part(s) of speech: Verb
